artifacts.summary: Session C progress: added irreflexive_mcs_has_strict_future lemma, proved unreachable cases via Temporal 4 closure, improved CantorApplication structure
Session D progress: added reflexivity derivation pattern for strict density proofs, reduced DensityFrameCondition sorries from 16 to 10

partial_progress.details: Phase 6 (strict density) partially implemented. Added reflexivity derivation pattern showing that if CanonicalR(V,M) and CanonicalR(M,V) then M is reflexive. This pattern closes the non-reflexive M cases. Remaining sorries require well-founded iteration for reflexive M cases.

completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 6 progress: added reflexivity derivation pattern showing mutual canonicalR implies source reflexivity. Reduced DensityFrameCondition sorries from 16 to 10. Remaining 13 sorries (10+3) require well-founded iteration approach for reflexive MCS cases.
